creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 168130
updated patch to upgrade to boost 1.60 (and also add long double support for recent FreeBSD)

Update patch to upgrade boost to 1.60 to revert addition of boost-libs/files/patch-bae401b1eb0594932c4e780d496cba852c23b75f by r411050 as this commit is already part of boost 1.60.  See <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=207429>.
